description: person_warnings on Patrick (I1) returns relativesHasAgeRangeGreaterThan120 -- the warning fires because his father Thomas has an implausible lifespan, not Patrick himself. personId in the warning is Thomas's id (I2). Used by ut_check_warnings_008 to test relative-mob handling.

warnings.message: A relative of this person has a lifespan greater than 120 years, which is implausible.
